attack_chain.description: Attacker compromised an internal compute instance that was accessible from the public internet.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: an internal compute instance that we created was accessible from the outside world... this compute instance was compromised

attack_chain.description: Attacker stole an AWS administrative API key stored on the compromised compute instance.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: it contained an AWS API key; (3) this compute instance was compromised and the AWS API key was stolen

evidence_chunks.quote: it contained an AWS API key; (3) this compute instance was compromised and the AWS API key was stolen
it contained an AWS API key; (3) this compute instance was compromised and the AWS API key was stolen

attack_chain.technique_name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token
attack_chain.description: Attacker used the stolen administrative AWS API key to authenticate to the production AWS account.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: unauthorized use of an administrative API key in one of our production AWS accounts in October 2018

evidence_chunks.quote: unauthorized use of an administrative API key in one of our production AWS accounts in October 2018
unauthorized use of an administrative API key in one of our production AWS accounts in October 2018

attack_chain.description: Attacker enumerated RDS database snapshots in the AWS account to find the target snapshot.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the AWS API key was used to access the snapshot

evidence_chunks.quote: the AWS API key was used to access the snapshot
the AWS API key was used to access the snapshot

attack_chain.description: Attacker accessed the RDS database snapshot (containing Incapsula customer data) using the stolen API key.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the AWS API key was used to access the snapshot

evidence_chunks.quote: the AWS API key was used to access the snapshot
the AWS API key was used to access the snapshot

attack_chain.description: Attacker exfiltrated the RDS snapshot contents, including emails, hashed & salted passwords, API keys, and TLS keys.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the data exfiltration occurred in October 2018

evidence_chunks.quote: the data exfiltration occurred in October 2018

initial_access_vector: Compromise of an internet-exposed internal compute instance that stored an AWS administrative API key
persistence_mechanism: None explicitly described; attacker leveraged valid stolen AWS API key
privilege_escalation: Not required — stolen key was already an administrative API key
